input: Who owns more vehicles: the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Eduardo', or the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Victor'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Dawn', who owns the most vehicles? If there's a tie, who among them is the oldest?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the vehicle with license plate '7D U3378', who does NOT own any pets?
Among the 15 people with the highest total bank balance, who lives in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Dawn'?
Among people living in the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate '443-JHD' who started their current employment in 2025, whose insurance policy expires first?

extra.verification_query: SELECT p.full_name FROM people p WHERE p.person_id = (SELECT ip.owner_id FROM insurance_policies ip WHERE ip.owner_id IN (SELECT e.owner_id FROM employments e WHERE e.owner_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.owner_id FROM addresses a WHERE a.state IN (SELECT a2.state FROM vehicles v JOIN addresses a2 ON v.owner_id = a2.owner_id WHERE v.license_plate = '443-JHD')) AND e.start_date >= '2025-01-01') ORDER BY ip.expires ASC LIMIT 1)

input: Among people living in the same state as the owner of pet 'Adrian', who owns the most vehicles? If there's a tie, who is the oldest?

extra.verification_query:
SELECT p.full_name
FROM people p
JOIN addresses a ON a.owner_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON v.owner_id = p.person_id
WHERE a.state = (
    SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet
    JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id
    WHERE pet.name = 'Adrian' LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY p.person_id
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT v.vehicle_id) DESC, p.dob ASC
LIMIT 1

input: What is the total bank balance of the person who has the most credit cards among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Betty'? If there's a tie for most credit cards, use the highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker.
Among people with 4 or more internet accounts who have the same blood type as the owner of pet 'Randall', who lives in the same state as the owner of pet 'Isabel'?

How many total financial and property records (bank accounts, credit cards, vehicles, and insurance policies combined) does the person with the highest total bank balance among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Ebony' have?
Among all people who live in the same state as the person with internet username 'reedjustin', who does NOT have any credit cards?

Who has more credit cards: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Caleb', or the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Charlotte'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Betty', who started their employment most recently?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Caleb', who does NOT have any credit cards?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Luis', or the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Alyssa'?

What is the total bank balance of the oldest person (by birth date) among those who live in the same state as the owner of the vehicle with license plate 'SMD-631' and have at least one insurance policy?

Who has more credit cards: the person with the most insurance policies among JCB 16 digit card holders (if there's a tie, the one with the highest total bank balance), or the person with the most pets among residents of the same state as the owner of the fish named 'Stacey' (if there's a tie, the one with the highest total bank balance)?

extra.verification_query:
WITH jcb_owners AS (
  SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards WHERE provider = 'JCB 16 digit'
),
chain_a_policies AS (
  SELECT j.owner_id, COUNT(*) as num_policies
  FROM jcb_owners j
  JOIN insurance_policies ip ON j.owner_id = ip.owner_id
  GROUP BY j.owner_id
),
chain_a_max AS (
  SELECT MAX(num_policies) as max_val FROM chain_a_policies
),
chain_a_top AS (
  SELECT cap.owner_id
  FROM chain_a_policies cap, chain_a_max cam
  WHERE cap.num_policies = cam.max_val
),
chain_a_balances AS (
  SELECT cat.owner_id, COALESCE(SUM(ba.balance), 0) as total_balance
  FROM chain_a_top cat
  LEFT JOIN bank_accounts ba ON cat.owner_id = ba.owner_id
  GROUP BY cat.owner_id
),
chain_a_winner AS (
  SELECT owner_id FROM chain_a_balances ORDER BY total_balance DESC LIMIT 1
),
stacey_state AS (
  SELECT a.state 
  FROM pets p 
  JOIN addresses a ON p.owner_id = a.owner_id 
  WHERE p.name = 'Stacey' AND p.species = 'Fish'
  LIMIT 1
),
same_state_residents AS (
  SELECT a.owner_id
  FROM addresses a, stacey_state ss
  WHERE a.state = ss.state
),
chain_b_pets AS (
  SELECT ssr.owner_id, COUNT(*) as num_pets
  FROM same_state_residents ssr
  JOIN pets p ON ssr.owner_id = p.owner_id
  GROUP BY ssr.owner_id
),
chain_b_max AS (
  SELECT MAX(num_pets) as max_val FROM chain_b_pets
),
chain_b_top AS (
  SELECT cbp.owner_id
  FROM chain_b_pets cbp, chain_b_max cbm
  WHERE cbp.num_pets = cbm.max_val
),
chain_b_balances AS (
  SELECT cbt.owner_id, COALESCE(SUM(ba.balance), 0) as total_balance
  FROM chain_b_top cbt
  LEFT JOIN bank_accounts ba ON cbt.owner_id = ba.owner_id
  GROUP BY cbt.owner_id
),
chain_b_winner AS (
  SELECT owner_id FROM chain_b_balances ORDER BY total_balance DESC LIMIT 1
),
card_counts AS (
  SELECT caw.owner_id, COUNT(cc.card_id) as num_cards
  FROM chain_a_winner caw
  LEFT JOIN credit_cards cc ON caw.owner_id = cc.owner_id
  GROUP BY caw.owner_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT cbw.owner_id, COUNT(cc.card_id) as num_cards
  FROM chain_b_winner cbw
  LEFT JOIN credit_cards cc ON cbw.owner_id = cc.owner_id
  GROUP BY cbw.owner_id
),
winner AS (
  SELECT owner_id FROM card_counts ORDER BY num_cards DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT p.full_name FROM people p WHERE p.person_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM winner LIMIT 1)

input: Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Julie', who owns the most pets? If there's a tie, who among them has the highest total bank balance? How many combined bank accounts, vehicles, credit cards, and insurance policies does that person have?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Tara', who has the most credit cards? If there's a tie, who among them has the highest total bank balance?

Who has more insurance policies: the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Tara', or the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Ashlee'?
Among people who own 3 or more pets, who lives in the same city as the person with internet username 'ashleylewis'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the internet account with username 'mooredana', whose insurance policy expires the soonest?

How many total records (pets, credit cards, insurance policies, bank accounts, and internet accounts combined) does the person with the most vehicles among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Dwayne' have?
Among all people who have an internet account at the same URL as the owner of the vehicle with license plate 'EUB7194', who does NOT own any vehicles?

Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Tara', who has the most bank accounts? If there is a tie, consider the one with the highest total bank balance. How many insurance policies does this person have?

Who has more insurance policies: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Lori', or the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Helen'?

Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Jose', who has the most pets? If there's a tie, who among them has the most insurance policies? If still tied, who has the most vehicles?

Who has a higher total bank balance: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Charlotte', or the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Francisco'?
Among the top 15 people by total bank balance who own at least one vehicle, who lives in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Austin'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Jose' and own at least one vehicle, whose employment started most recently?

How many total records (bank accounts, vehicles, insurance policies, and internet accounts combined) does the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Betty' have?
What is the total bank account balance of the person who has the most credit cards among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Dawn'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Jeanette', who does NOT have any insurance policies?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Gloria', or the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Betty'?

Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Gloria', who owns the most vehicles? If there's a tie, who among them has the most bank accounts? If still tied, who has the highest total bank balance?

How many total records (pets + vehicles + credit cards + insurance policies + internet accounts) does the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate 'W93-OOP' have?

extra.verification_query:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pets WHERE owner_id = target.person_id) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles WHERE owner_id = target.person_id) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards WHERE owner_id = target.person_id) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM insurance_policies WHERE owner_id = target.person_id) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internet_accounts WHERE owner_id = target.person_id) as total_records
FROM (
    SELECT owner_id as person_id, SUM(balance) as total_balance
    FROM bank_accounts
    WHERE owner_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT owner_id FROM addresses WHERE state IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT a.state FROM vehicles v
            JOIN addresses a ON a.owner_id = v.owner_id
            WHERE v.license_plate = 'W93-OOP'
        )
    )
    GROUP BY owner_id
    ORDER BY total_balance DESC
    LIMIT 1
) as target

input: Who has more credit cards: the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Dominique' (using highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker), or the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Dwayne'?

What is the total bank balance of the person with the most insurance policies among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Lindsey'? If there's a tie for most insurance policies, consider the one with the highest total bank balance.
Among all vehicle owners who live in the same state as the owner of the vehicle with license plate '270U8', whose insurance policy expires the soonest?

How many total records (pets, vehicles, credit cards, internet accounts, and insurance policies combined) does the person with the most credit cards among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Dawn' have?

Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Victor', who has the most credit cards? If there's a tie, who among them has the most vehicles? If still tied, who has the most bank accounts?

Who has more insurance policies: the person with the most vehicles among all holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of license plate 'UOP 980' (using highest total bank balance as tiebreaker), or the person with the most vehicles among all holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of license plate 'LSU 558' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Carol' (using highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker), or the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Frederick' (using the same tiebreaker)?
Among people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named Jasmine and do not own any vehicles, who does not own any pets? If there are multiple, who among them is the oldest?

extra.verification_query: SELECT p.full_name FROM people p JOIN addresses a ON a.owner_id = p.person_id WHERE a.state = (SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id WHERE pet.name = 'Jasmine' LIMIT 1) AND p.person_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT owner_id FROM vehicles) AND p.person_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT owner_id FROM pets) ORDER BY p.dob ASC LIMIT 1

input: What is the total bank account balance of the person with the most credit cards among all residents of the same state as the owner of the vehicle with license plate '6UV 087'? If there's a tie for most credit cards, use the highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker.
Among the 15 people with the highest total bank balance, who lives in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Paige'?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the user with internet username 'catherine65' (using total bank balance as a tiebreaker), or the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the user with internet username 'renee29' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Tara', who owns the most vehicles? If there's a tie, who has the most credit cards? If still tied, who has the highest total bank balance?

Who has more bank accounts: the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Ashlee' (using highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker), or the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the user with internet username 'chasemary' (using the same tiebreaker)?

What is the total bank balance of the person with the most internet accounts among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Melvin'? If there's a tie for most internet accounts, consider the one with the highest total bank balance.

Who has more credit cards: the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Austin' (using total bank balance as a tiebreaker), or the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Caleb' (using the same tiebreaker)?
Among the 15 people with the highest total bank account balance, who has the same blood type as the owner of the pet named 'Meagan'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Becky', who has the most credit cards? If there's a tie, who among them owns the most vehicles?

What is the combined total bank balance of the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Tara', AND the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Dawn'? (Use highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker if there's a tie for most credit cards.)
Among people who have exactly 6 bank accounts, who owns a vehicle with the same make as a vehicle owned by the owner of the pet named 'Ana'?

What is the total bank balance of the person with the most internet accounts among all residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Gloria'? If there's a tie for most internet accounts, use the highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker.

Who owns more pets: the person with the most credit cards among people who share the same blood type as the owner of the pet named 'Andre' (using highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker), or the person with the most credit cards among people who share the same blood type as the owner of the pet named 'Antonio' (using the same tiebreaker)?
Among all people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Francisco', who has the most credit cards? If there's a tie, who among them has the highest total bank account balance?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the most insurance policies among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Gloria' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied), or the person with the most insurance policies among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Lori' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who has a higher total bank account balance: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the person with internet username 'jerry57', OR the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the person with internet username 'kevin66'?

What is the total bank balance of the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Cesar'? If there's a tie for most vehicles, use highest total bank balance as the tiebreaker.
What is the total bank balance of the person with the highest bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Marcus' who have exactly 5 credit cards?

extra.verification_query:
SELECT SUM(ba.balance) as total_balance
FROM bank_accounts ba
WHERE ba.owner_id = (
    SELECT a.owner_id
    FROM addresses a
    JOIN credit_cards cc ON cc.owner_id = a.owner_id
    WHERE a.state = (
        SELECT a2.state 
        FROM pets pet 
        JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id 
        WHERE pet.name = 'Marcus' 
        LIMIT 1
    )
    GROUP BY a.owner_id
    HAVING COUNT(cc.card_id) = 5
    ORDER BY (
        SELECT SUM(ba2.balance) 
        FROM bank_accounts ba2 
        WHERE ba2.owner_id = a.owner_id
    ) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)

input: Who has more bank accounts: the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Betty', or the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Alyssa'? (Use total bank balance as a tiebreaker if there's a tie for most credit cards.) If tied on bank accounts, return the person with the higher total bank balance.

Who has more insurance policies: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of the vehicle with license plate 'LMF 674', OR the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of the vehicle with license plate 'HPG 599'?
What is the combined bank balance of the 3 people with the most insurance policies among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Victor'?
Among all people who live in the same state as the person with internet username 'nrowe', who has the most bank accounts? If there's a tie, who has the highest total bank account balance?

Who has more insurance policies: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Wesley', or the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Dominique'?

Who owns more pets: the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Lindsey' (using highest total bank balance as tiebreaker), or the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Tanner' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who has more credit cards: the person with the highest salary among those with the same blood type as the owner of pet 'Frederick', OR the person with the highest salary among those with the same blood type as the owner of pet 'Tommy'?

Who has more vehicles: the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Molly' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied for most credit cards), OR the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Charlotte' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who owns more pets: the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Dwayne' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied), or the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Ebony' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who has more credit cards: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Caleb', or the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Becky'?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the most credit cards among Mastercard holders who live in the same state as the owner of pet 'Betty' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied), OR the person with the most credit cards among Discover cardholders who live in the same state as the owner of pet 'Mackenzie' (using the same tiebreaker)? If tied on vehicles, return the person with the higher total bank balance.

extra.verification_query: WITH left_group AS (SELECT DISTINCT a.owner_id FROM addresses a WHERE a.state IN (SELECT DISTINCT a2.state FROM pets p JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = p.owner_id WHERE p.name = 'Betty') AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards WHERE provider = 'Mastercard')), left_winner AS (SELECT lg.owner_id FROM left_group lg ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards cc WHERE cc.owner_id = lg.owner_id) DESC, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM bank_accounts ba WHERE ba.owner_id = lg.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1), right_group AS (SELECT DISTINCT a.owner_id FROM addresses a WHERE a.state IN (SELECT DISTINCT a2.state FROM pets p JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = p.owner_id WHERE p.name = 'Mackenzie') AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards WHERE provider = 'Discover')), right_winner AS (SELECT rg.owner_id FROM right_group rg ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards cc WHERE cc.owner_id = rg.owner_id) DESC, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM bank_accounts ba WHERE ba.owner_id = rg.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1), winner AS (SELECT left_winner.owner_id FROM left_winner WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = left_winner.owner_id) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM right_winner)) UNION ALL SELECT right_winner.owner_id FROM right_winner WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = right_winner.owner_id) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM left_winner)) UNION ALL SELECT left_winner.owner_id FROM left_winner WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = left_winner.owner_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM right_winner)) AND (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM bank_accounts ba WHERE ba.owner_id = left_winner.owner_id) > (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM bank_accounts ba WHERE ba.owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM right_winner)) UNION ALL SELECT right_winner.owner_id FROM right_winner WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = right_winner.owner_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles v WHERE v.owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM left_winner)) AND (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM bank_accounts ba WHERE ba.owner_id = right_winner.owner_id) >= (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM bank_accounts ba WHERE ba.owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM left_winner))) SELECT p.full_name FROM people p WHERE p.person_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM winner LIMIT 1)

input: Who owns more pets: the person with the highest total bank balance among holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of pet 'Melvin', OR the person with the highest total bank balance among holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of pet 'Ruth'?

Who has more internet accounts: the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Tara', OR the person with the highest total bank balance among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Victor'?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate '042 IEW', OR the person with the highest salary among residents of the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate '020-WNY'?

Who has more credit cards: the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate '41L G89' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied for most vehicles), OR the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate '4GO N78' (using the same tiebreaker)?
Among people with the highest total bank balance in their state, who owns the most vehicles? If tied, who is oldest?

extra.verification_query: SELECT p.full_name FROM people p WHERE p.person_id = (WITH state_top_balance AS (SELECT a.state, b.owner_id, SUM(b.balance) as total_balance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.state ORDER BY SUM(b.balance) DESC) as rn FROM bank_accounts b JOIN addresses a ON a.owner_id = b.owner_id GROUP BY a.state, b.owner_id), top_holders AS (SELECT DISTINCT owner_id FROM state_top_balance WHERE rn = 1), vehicle_counts AS (SELECT th.owner_id, COUNT(v.vehicle_id) as vehicle_count FROM top_holders th LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON v.owner_id = th.owner_id GROUP BY th.owner_id), max_vehicle_holders AS (SELECT owner_id FROM vehicle_counts WHERE vehicle_count = (SELECT MAX(vehicle_count) FROM vehicle_counts)) SELECT mvh.owner_id FROM max_vehicle_holders mvh JOIN people p2 ON p2.person_id = mvh.owner_id ORDER BY p2.dob ASC LIMIT 1)

input: Who owns more insurance policies: the person with the oldest vehicle among residents of the same state as the user with internet username 'alexshah' (using highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker if tied for oldest vehicle), OR the person with the oldest vehicle among residents of the same state as the user with internet username 'erik05' (using the same tiebreaker)?
Among people living in the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate '123-DJR', whose credit card expires first?

extra.verification_query:
SELECT p.full_name 
FROM people p 
WHERE p.person_id = (
    SELECT cc.owner_id 
    FROM addresses a 
    JOIN credit_cards cc ON cc.owner_id = a.owner_id 
    WHERE a.state = (
        SELECT a2.state 
        FROM vehicles v 
        JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = v.owner_id 
        WHERE v.license_plate = '123-DJR' 
        LIMIT 1
    )
    ORDER BY cc.expire ASC, cc.owner_id ASC 
    LIMIT 1
)

input: Who owns more vehicles: the person with the most insurance policies among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Mackenzie' (using highest total bank balance as a tiebreaker if tied for most insurance policies), OR the person with the most insurance policies among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Jose' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who has more credit cards: the person with the oldest vehicle among those who share the same blood type as the owner of pet 'Carol' (using total bank balance as a tiebreaker if multiple people have the same oldest vehicle year), OR the person with the oldest vehicle among those who share the same blood type as the owner of pet 'Antonio' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who owns more pets: the person with the oldest vehicle among Auto insurance policy holders who live in the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate 'QYM 310' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied for oldest vehicle), OR the person with the oldest vehicle among Auto insurance policy holders who live in the same state as the owner of vehicle with license plate 'R40 7KJ' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who owns more pets: the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Alyssa' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied for most vehicles), OR the person with the most vehicles among residents of the same state as the owner of pet 'Gloria' (using the same tiebreaker)?

Who owns more vehicles: the person with the highest salary among all holders of the same insurance type as the owner of pet 'Dawn', OR the person with the highest salary among all holders of the same insurance type as the owner of pet 'Allen'?

Who has more insurance policies: the person with the highest salary among holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of vehicle with license plate '699 0026', OR the person with the highest salary among holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of vehicle with license plate 'UOP 980'?

How many total records (credit cards + vehicles + bank accounts + insurance policies + internet accounts) does the person with the most credit cards among residents of the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Dawn' have?

extra.verification_query:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards WHERE owner_id = (
        SELECT a.owner_id FROM addresses a 
        WHERE a.state = (SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id WHERE pet.name = 'Dawn' LIMIT 1)
        AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards)
        GROUP BY a.owner_id
        ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards c WHERE c.owner_id = a.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1
    )) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles WHERE owner_id = (
        SELECT a.owner_id FROM addresses a 
        WHERE a.state = (SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id WHERE pet.name = 'Dawn' LIMIT 1)
        AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards)
        GROUP BY a.owner_id
        ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards c WHERE c.owner_id = a.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1
    )) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bank_accounts WHERE owner_id = (
        SELECT a.owner_id FROM addresses a 
        WHERE a.state = (SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id WHERE pet.name = 'Dawn' LIMIT 1)
        AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards)
        GROUP BY a.owner_id
        ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards c WHERE c.owner_id = a.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1
    )) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM insurance_policies WHERE owner_id = (
        SELECT a.owner_id FROM addresses a 
        WHERE a.state = (SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id WHERE pet.name = 'Dawn' LIMIT 1)
        AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards)
        GROUP BY a.owner_id
        ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards c WHERE c.owner_id = a.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1
    )) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internet_accounts WHERE owner_id = (
        SELECT a.owner_id FROM addresses a 
        WHERE a.state = (SELECT a2.state FROM pets pet JOIN addresses a2 ON a2.owner_id = pet.owner_id WHERE pet.name = 'Dawn' LIMIT 1)
        AND a.owner_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM credit_cards)
        GROUP BY a.owner_id
        ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_cards c WHERE c.owner_id = a.owner_id) DESC LIMIT 1
    )) as total_count

input: Who has more credit cards: the person with the most internet accounts among holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of pet 'Ruth' (using total bank balance as tiebreaker if tied for most internet accounts), OR the person with the most internet accounts among holders of the same credit card provider as the owner of pet 'Luis' (using the same tiebreaker)? If tied on credit cards, return the person with the higher total bank balance.
Among people who live in the same state as the owner of the pet named 'Todd' the dog, who does NOT have any employment records? If there are multiple, who among them is the oldest?

extra.verification_query:
WITH pet_owner AS (
  SELECT owner_id FROM pets WHERE name = 'Todd' AND species = 'Dog' LIMIT 1
),
pet_owner_states AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT state FROM addresses WHERE owner_id = (SELECT owner_id FROM pet_owner)
),
state_residents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT a.owner_id FROM addresses a WHERE a.state IN (SELECT state FROM pet_owner_states)
),
residents_without_employment AS (
  SELECT owner_id FROM state_residents
  WHERE owner_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT owner_id FROM employments)
)
SELECT p.full_name
FROM people p
WHERE p.person_id IN (SELECT owner_id FROM residents_without_employment)
ORDER BY p.dob ASC
LIMIT 1
